Unlike these other groups that are flooding the marketplace with stolen assets and use burner accounts to evade termination, i'm using my main account when publishing, and all my models are made from scratch. I put all of my effort into making sure each one of my items are made with the high quality people deserve, and they're always at the minimum price possible with regional pricing enabled too. Thanks for reading!
